    Index

    A B C D E F G H I L M N O P R S T U V W 
    Alle Klassen und Schnittstellen|Alle Packages|Serialisierte Form

    R

    read - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.response.NotificationResponse
    Whether the user has acknowledged the notification.
    read - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.entity.Notification
    Whether the user has acknowledged this notification.
    register(UserRegisterRequest) - Methode in Klasse at.jku.se.resource.UserResource
    Registers a new user with a hashed password (FR-01, NFR-02).
    rename(Long, DeviceRenameRequest) - Methode in Klasse at.jku.se.resource.DeviceResource
    Renames an existing device (FR-05).
    rename(Long, RoomRequest) - Methode in Klasse at.jku.se.resource.RoomResource
    Renames an existing room (FR-03).
    revokeMember(Long) - Methode in Klasse at.jku.se.resource.UserResource
    Revokes a member's access by deleting their account (FR-20).
    role - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.request.UserRegisterRequest
    Role assigned to the new account, defaults to MEMBER.
    role - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.response.UserResponse
    Access role granted to the user.
    role - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.entity.User
    Access role determining what the user may do (FR-13).
    room - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.entity.Device
    The room this device is installed in.
    Room - Klasse in at.jku.se.entity
    A named room (e.g., "Living Room", "Kitchen") that groups devices together.
    Room() - Konstruktor für Klasse at.jku.se.entity.Room
    Creates an empty entity; fields are populated before persisting.
    RoomEnergySummary() - Konstruktor für Klasse at.jku.se.dto.response.EnergyDashboardResponse.RoomEnergySummary
    Creates an empty per-room summary; fields are populated by the service layer.
    roomId - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.response.DeviceResponse
    Identifier of the room the device is assigned to.
    roomId - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.response.EnergyDashboardResponse.RoomEnergySummary
    Identifier of the room.
    RoomMapper - Klasse in at.jku.se.mapper
    Maps Room entities to response DTOs.
    roomName - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.response.ActivityLogResponse
    Name of the room the device belongs to.
    roomName - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.response.DeviceResponse
    Name of the room the device is assigned to.
    roomName - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.response.EnergyDashboardResponse.DeviceEnergySummary
    Room the device is assigned to.
    roomName - Variable in Klasse at.jku.se.dto.response.EnergyDashboardResponse.RoomEnergySummary
    Display name of the room.
    RoomRepository - Klasse in at.jku.se.repository
    Repository for Room entities.
    RoomRepository() - Konstruktor für Klasse at.jku.se.repository.RoomRepository
    Creates the repository; intended for CDI instantiation.
    RoomRequest - Klasse in at.jku.se.dto.request
    Request body for creating or renaming a room (FR-03).
    RoomRequest() - Konstruktor für Klasse at.jku.se.dto.request.RoomRequest
    Creates an empty request; fields are populated during deserialization.
    RoomResource - Klasse in at.jku.se.resource
    REST resource for room management (FR-03).
    RoomResource() - Konstruktor für Klasse at.jku.se.resource.RoomResource
    Creates the resource; intended for CDI instantiation.
    RoomResponse - Klasse in at.jku.se.dto.response
    Response DTO for a room.
    RoomResponse() - Konstruktor für Klasse at.jku.se.dto.response.RoomResponse
    Creates an empty response; fields are populated by the mapping layer.
    Rule - Klasse in at.jku.se.entity
    An IF-THEN automation rule evaluated by the rule engine (FR-10, FR-11).
    Rule() - Konstruktor für Klasse at.jku.se.entity.Rule
    Creates an empty entity; fields are populated before persisting.
    RuleEngineService - Klasse in at.jku.se.service
    Evaluates active EVENT and THRESHOLD rules when a device state changes (FR-12).
    RuleEngineService() - Konstruktor für Klasse at.jku.se.service.RuleEngineService
    Creates the service; intended for CDI instantiation.
    RuleMapper - Klasse in at.jku.se.mapper
    Maps Rule entities to response DTOs.
    RuleRepository - Klasse in at.jku.se.repository
    Repository for Rule entities.
    RuleRepository() - Konstruktor für Klasse at.jku.se.repository.RuleRepository
    Creates the repository; intended for CDI instantiation.
    RuleRequest - Klasse in at.jku.se.dto.request
    Request body for creating or updating an automation rule (FR-10, FR-11).
    RuleRequest() - Konstruktor für Klasse at.jku.se.dto.request.RuleRequest
    Creates an empty request; fields are populated during deserialization.
    RuleResource - Klasse in at.jku.se.resource
    REST resource for IF-THEN automation rules (FR-10, FR-11).
    RuleResource() - Konstruktor für Klasse at.jku.se.resource.RuleResource
    Creates the resource; intended for CDI instantiation.
    RuleResponse - Klasse in at.jku.se.dto.response
    Response DTO for an automation rule.
    RuleResponse() - Konstruktor für Klasse at.jku.se.dto.response.RuleResponse
    Creates an empty response; fields are populated by the mapping layer.
